user.title: Connect to Erg Scheduler
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Erg energy scheduler server.

auth_method.title: Authentication Method
auth_method.description: The server supports sign-in. Choose how to authenticate.

oidc_login.title: Sign In
oidc_login.description: Complete the sign-in process in the browser window that opened.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-authenticate.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Erg server. Check the host and port.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your API token.

abort.already_configured: This Erg server is already configured.
abort.oidc_flow_failed: The sign-in process failed. Please try again.
abort.oidc_flow_expired: The sign-in session expired. Please try again.
abort.oidc_flow_timeout: The sign-in process timed out. Please try again.
abort.api_key_created: Authentication successful. A long-lived API key has been created.

user.title: Job Details
user.description: Enter the basic details for this scheduled job.

data.min_ac_power: Minimum AC power (kW, for variable-power loads)
data.low_benefit: Low benefit ($/run, for energy above minimum)

data_description.entity_id: The Home Assistant entity this job controls.
data_description.ac_power: AC power draw when active (kW). Positive = consumption.
data_description.min_ac_power: Minimum AC power when active (kW). Only used with target energy > 0.
data_description.dc_power: DC power (kW). For solar panels or DC-coupled devices.
data_description.force: When enabled, this job runs for its full duration regardless of energy cost.
data_description.benefit: Economic value of running this job for its full duration ($/run).
data_description.target_energy: Total energy to deliver (kWh). Set to 0 for fixed-power devices. Set > 0 for variable-power loads like EV chargers.
data_description.min_energy: High-priority energy portion (kWh). The solver prioritises this amount. Leave 0 if all energy is equally important.
data_description.low_benefit: Benefit for energy above the minimum ($/run). Set lower than benefit to make the top-up optional.
data_description.depends_on: Entity ID of a job that must finish before this one starts. Leave empty for no dependency.
data_description.enabled: Whether this job is included in scheduling.

recurring.title: Recurring Schedule
recurring.description: Configure the recurring schedule for this job.

oneshot.title: One-Shot Schedule
oneshot.description: Configure the one-shot schedule for this job.

error.already_exists: A job with this entity ID already exists.

abort.config_entry_not_loaded: The integration must be loaded before adding jobs.
abort.already_configured: A job for this entity already exists.

data_description.grid_import_limit: Maximum power the home can draw from the grid (kW).
data_description.grid_export_limit: Maximum power the home can export to the grid (kW).
data_description.inverter_power: Maximum AC power the battery inverter can produce or consume (kW).
data_description.battery_capacity: Total usable battery capacity (kWh). Set to 0 if no battery.
data_description.battery_soc_entity: Sensor that reports the current battery state of charge.
data_description.battery_efficiency: Round-trip battery efficiency (0-1). 0.9 means 10% loss per cycle.
data_description.solar_forecast_provider: How to obtain solar forecasts. Auto-discover finds Forecast.Solar or Solcast.

data_description.tariff_source: Where to get electricity prices. Manual uses the tariff periods you configure. AEMO fetches live wholesale prices.
data_description.aemo_region: Australian NEM region for wholesale prices. Only used when tariff source is AEMO.
data_description.slot_duration: Length of each scheduling time slot. Smaller slots give finer control but slower solves.
data_description.extend_to_end_of_day: Extend the scheduling horizon to midnight, ensuring full-day coverage.
data_description.update_interval: How often to re-solve the schedule (minutes).

data_description.battery_storage_value: Value assigned to each kWh remaining at end of horizon. Higher values retain more charge ($/kWh).
data_description.battery_preservation: Penalty for operating outside the preferred charge band ($/kWh). Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.preservation_lower_bound: Minimum preferred charge level (0.3 = 30%). LFP batteries can use 0.1.
data_description.preservation_upper_bound: Maximum preferred charge level (0.8 = 80%). LFP batteries can use 0.95.
data_description.solar_confidence: Derating factor for solar forecast (0-1). 0.8 means plan for 80% of forecasted solar.

import_tariffs_yaml.title: Import Tariffs from YAML
import_tariffs_yaml.description:
Paste your tariff periods as YAML. This will replace all existing tariffs.

Expected format:
```
periods:
  - start: "00:00"
    end: "07:00"
    import_price: 0.12
    feed_in_price: 0.05
```

error.invalid_time: Invalid time. Use HH:MM format, e.g. 09:00, 17:30.
error.invalid_duration: Invalid duration. Use h/m/s components, e.g. 1h, 30m, 1h30m.
error.invalid_yaml: Invalid YAML. Check the format and try again.
error.invalid_yaml_time: Invalid time in YAML. Times must use HH:MM format (e.g. 09:00, 17:30).
error.invalid_yaml_price: Invalid price in YAML. Prices must be non-negative numbers.
